title: Atmospheric Horror
description: A Minecraft modpack that aims to add atmospheric horror elements without adding a single monster.
body:
![DARK CAVE WITH A TORCH ILLUMINATING IT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2699ba3741034956b03356101516fe1cc32684ef_0.webp)

# MINECRAFT HAS NEVER BEEN EERIER.

###  EXPERIENCE MINECRAFT LIKE NEVER BEFORE.

- find the darkness of the night and caves
- fear the unknown hiding in the dark
- feel the VHS horror

###   NO NEW MONSTERS, JUST AMPLIFIED HORROR ATMOSPHERE

- darkness lurks at every corner, only torches will illuminate your path
- no new monsters, just the default minecraft mobs
- experience a horror minecraft modpack without boring cave dwellers

### EXPERIENCE THE HORROR OF FOUND-FOOTAGE STYLE GAMEPLAY

- VHS effects cover your screen
- play minecraft in a new style
- use a new aspect ratio

![A DARK WOODLAND MANSION WITH NO ONE INSIDE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17fa2dbcbedd7838ecdee38a3c4b6af31e6bc6c4_0.webp)
